summary: FASE 2 testing completed successfully. All new features working: Dashboard with 6 command center sections (HOY, BLOQUEOS POR CLIENTE, BLOQUEOS POR PROVEEDOR, APROBACIONES PENDIENTES, PAGOS A REVISAR, ARCHIVOS PENDIENTES), Files module redesigned as Centro Documental with 11 categories and file statuses, Tasks with new fields (description, service, task_type, next_step, related items), Weekly Summary with all 6 sections, PUT /api/files/{file_id} endpoint, POST /api/automations/run-followups endpoint.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Backend: Login with info@victoriaeventos.com / Victoria2024 - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/command-center returns bloqueos_cliente, bloqueos_proveedor, archivos_pendientes
Backend: POST /api/automations/run-followups returns created count
Backend: PUT /api/files/{file_id} updates file metadata (status, category, description)
Backend: POST /api/files creates file with FASE 2 fields (category, file_status, origin, version)
Backend: POST /api/tasks creates task with FASE 2 fields (description, service, task_type, next_step, related_*)
Backend: All 9 tab endpoints working (no Invitados)
UI: Dashboard shows 6 command center sections
UI: HOY TENGO QUE HACER ESTO section with 6 tasks
UI: BLOQUEOS POR CLIENTE section (1 task with esperando_cliente status)
UI: BLOQUEOS POR PROVEEDOR section (Sin bloqueos)
UI: APROBACIONES PENDIENTES section
UI: PAGOS A REVISAR section (2 items - 1595€, 1500€)
UI: ARCHIVOS PENDIENTES section
UI: Event detail shows 9 tabs (Invitados correctly hidden)
UI: Archivos tab shows Centro Documental title
UI: Archivos tab has upload button, category filter, status filter
UI: Upload dialog shows all FASE 2 fields (Categoría, Origen, Estado, Descripción, Servicio relacionado, Notas)
UI: File cards show status badges (Pendiente revisión, Aprobado, Final)
UI: File edit dialog shows all FASE 2 fields
UI: Tasks tab shows Nueva Tarea button with new fields
UI: Task form shows: Descripción corta, Tipo de tarea, Servicio principal, Próximo paso
UI: Task form shows 3 related item dropdowns (Proveedor, Presupuesto, Archivo)
UI: Task filters work (Todas, Hoy, Esta semana, Vencidas, Esperando, Aprobaciones)
UI: Vencidas filter shows only overdue tasks (2 tasks)
UI: Tasks show priority color indicators (red border for alta)
UI: Tasks show Vencida badge for overdue tasks
UI: Semanal tab shows Resumen Semanal with progress bar (39%)
UI: Semanal tab shows 3 Prioridades de la Semana
UI: Semanal tab shows 3 Tareas Críticas with Vencida badges
UI: Semanal tab shows Bloqueos Activos (0)
UI: Semanal tab shows Pagos Pendientes (2) with euro amounts
UI: Semanal tab shows Archivos Pendientes (1)
UI: Semanal tab shows Proveedores Pendientes (1)
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard command-center correctly separates bloqueos_cliente and bloqueos_proveedor
Files module properly implements 11 categories and 3 file statuses
PUT /api/files/{file_id} endpoint correctly validates allowed fields
POST /api/automations/run-followups creates follow-up tasks for blocked items >3 days
Tasks model includes all new fields (description, service, task_type, next_step, requires_approval, related_*)
WeeklySummary component shows all 6 required sections
Minor: Dialog components missing aria-describedby for accessibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: FASE 2 fully tested and working. Dashboard has 6 command center sections (HOY, BLOQUEOS POR CLIENTE, BLOQUEOS POR PROVEEDOR, APROBACIONES PENDIENTES, PAGOS A REVISAR, ARCHIVOS PENDIENTES). Event tabs are now 9 (Invitados hidden). Files have new fields: category (11 options), file_status (pendiente_revision/aprobado/final), origin (email/manual/pendiente_revisar), version. Tasks have new fields: description, service, task_type, next_step, requires_approval, related_supplier_id, related_budget_id, related_file_id. Weekly Summary shows: 3 Prioridades, 3 Críticas, Bloqueos Activos, Pagos Pendientes, Archivos Pendientes, Proveedores Pendientes. data-testid attributes: upload-file-btn, new-task-btn, filter-overdue, task-card-{id}, file-card-{id}, weekly-summary.
